query:
-- Insert Amber's children (House of Hunter bloodline grandchildren)
INSERT INTO pending_house_heirs (parentHouseId, parentHouseName, parentMemberName, otherParentName, fullName, dateOfBirth, relationship, generation, projectedHouseName, projectedHouseType, activationTrigger, projectedActivationDate, distributionPercentage, percentageLocked, status, registeredBy, notes)
VALUES 
-- Kyle T. Christopher - DOB 9/19/2012 - turns 18 on 9/19/2030
(2, 'House of Hunter', 'Amber S. Hunter', 'Cornelius D. Christopher', 'Kyle T. Christopher', '2012-09-19 00:00:00', 'grandchild', 3, 'House of Christopher', 'bloodline', 'age_18', '2030-09-19 00:00:00', 60.00, true, 'pending', 1, 'Mirror Token House - 60% retained, 12.5% to Parent (Hunter), 27.5% to Root. May issue 3 Gift Tokens upon activation.'),

-- Tyler K. Christopher - DOB 12/12/2013 - turns 18 on 12/12/2031
(2, 'House of Hunter', 'Amber S. Hunter', 'Cornelius D. Christopher', 'Tyler K. Christopher', '2013-12-12 00:00:00', 'grandchild', 3, 'House of Christopher', 'bloodline', 'age_18', '2031-12-12 00:00:00', 60.00, true, 'pending', 1, 'Mirror Token House - 60% retained, 12.5% to Parent (Hunter), 27.5% to Root. May issue 3 Gift Tokens upon activation.'),

-- Cayde D. Christopher - DOB 7/18/2021 - turns 18 on 7/18/2039
(2, 'House of Hunter', 'Amber S. Hunter', 'Cornelius D. Christopher', 'Cayde D. Christopher', '2021-07-18 00:00:00', 'grandchild', 3, 'House of Christopher', 'bloodline', 'age_18', '2039-07-18 00:00:00', 60.00, true, 'pending', 1, 'Mirror Token House - 60% retained, 12.5% to Parent (Hunter), 27.5% to Root. May issue 3 Gift Tokens upon activation.'),

-- Riyan S. Christopher - DOB 5/29/2024 - turns 18 on 5/29/2042
(2, 'House of Hunter', 'Amber S. Hunter', 'Cornelius D. Christopher', 'Riyan S. Christopher', '2024-05-29 00:00:00', 'grandchild', 3, 'House of Christopher', 'bloodline', 'age_18', '2042-05-29 00:00:00', 60.00, true, 'pending', 1, 'Mirror Token House - 60% retained, 12.5% to Parent (Hunter), 27.5% to Root. May issue 3 Gift Tokens upon activation.');

-- Insert Essence's child (House of Hunter bloodline grandchild)
INSERT INTO pending_house_heirs (parentHouseId, parentHouseName, parentMemberName, otherParentName, fullName, dateOfBirth, relationship, generation, projectedHouseName, projectedHouseType, activationTrigger, projectedActivationDate, distributionPercentage, percentageLocked, status, registeredBy, notes)
VALUES 
-- Alani Rain Maes - DOB 10/31/2020 - turns 18 on 10/31/2038
(2, 'House of Hunter', 'Essence M. Hunter', 'Luise Maes', 'Alani Rain Maes', '2020-10-31 00:00:00', 'grandchild', 3, 'House of Maes', 'bloodline', 'age_18', '2038-10-31 00:00:00', 60.00, true, 'pending', 1, 'Mirror Token House - 60% retained, 12.5% to Parent (Hunter), 27.5% to Root. May issue 3 Gift Tokens upon activation.');

-- Insert Carter (Craig's grandson - Adapted Line)
INSERT INTO pending_house_heirs (parentHouseId, parentHouseName, parentMemberName, otherParentName, fullName, dateOfBirth, relationship, generation, projectedHouseName, projectedHouseType, activationTrigger, distributionPercentage, percentageLocked, status, registeredBy, notes)
VALUES 
(3, 'House of Russell', 'Craig A. Russell', NULL, 'Carter A. Russell', '2020-01-01 00:00:00', 'other', 3, 'House of Russell (Carter Branch)', 'adaptive', 'age_18', 80.00, true, 'pending', 1, 'Adapted House (Non-Bloodline) - 80% retained, 20% to Root. Not part of bloodline; no Mirror Token issuance rights.');
